playbook.intent: Team runs a 45-min retro at sprint close. Inputs are not opinions only — also: AI-aggregated mistake-memory entries since last retro, alert volume, on-call load, PR-cycle time. Outputs are 2-3 concrete experiments for the next sprint, each with an owner.
playbook.scope: Team runs a 45-min retro at sprint close. Inputs are not opinions only — also: AI-aggregated mistake-memory entries since last retro, alert volume, on-call load, PR-cycle time. Outputs are 2-3 concrete experiments for the next sprint, each with an owner.

success-criteria.criterion: All 3 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Collect Signal

tasks.task: Pull mistake-memory entries since last retro
Pull incident postmortems and missed AC

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all three sources are gathered.

stage.name: Run the Retro

tasks.task: Walk through what worked, what didn't, surprises
Pick top-3 patterns to act on next 2 weeks

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each pattern has an owner and a measurable signal.

stage.name: Update the System, Not Just the Doc
stage.intent: Memory is only useful if it changes behaviour.

tasks.task: Update SOPs, checklists, or tooling per the patterns
Add or modify ruff/ESLint rules where pattern is mechanical
Communicate the changes to the team

stage.decision-gate: Required output: at least one written behaviour change deployed.
